title: Strike against Ubertica
content:

{{Quote|We have acquired five warships which shall rain destruction on Ubertica—then we will personally land and finish off the survivors one by one to forever erase their memory from the universe.|[[War-Master]] [[Savax]]|<ref name="Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
At some point between [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Savax]], [[War-Master]] of the [[Southern Wastes]] of [[Uba IV/Legends|Uba IV]], led a force of so-called True [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] in a '''strike''' against the ''[[yrak pootzck]]'' Ubese of [[Ubertica]].

While not part of a formally declared war, the battle was part of a long-brewing blood feud between the two Ubese communities which dated back over one millennium to the [[bombardment of the Uba system]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. While most of the Ubese population who survived that battle were left to eke out a living as nomads in Uba IV's wastes, a minority was rescued and taken to start a new life on the relatively pleasant planet Ubertica. When the Ubese of Uba IV began to make their way off their home planet, they found that their long-lost cousins were accepted as part of galactic society. Savax, and other Ubese who felt the same way, believed that only the destruction of the "''yrak pootzck''" Ubese would allow the "True" Ubese to take their rightful place in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Savax's forces consisted of a coalition of several "True" Ubese clans, including his own [[Clan-Vorsazg]]. His fleet consisted of five [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] of unknown class, which were later rumored to have been supplied by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. When his fleet arrived in orbit around Ubertica, they began a bombardment which destroyed many of the planet's urban areas. Savax's intention was to destroy as many of the planet's settlements as possible from orbit, then land his forces to search for and kill any survivors.

Fortunately for the survivors on Ubertica, not to mention the other planets in the sector, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] quickly learned of Savax's attack. An Imperial [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] was soon dispatched to Ubertica. The Imperials struck back at Savax's marauders, killing Savax and vaporizing all five of his vessels.

Amongst the wreckage of Savax's fleet, a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] was discovered which laid out the justifications for his genocidal acts.
